title: Keep file when creating or moving an item
excerpt: When i want to create an item via automation in another board using another item, i can’t link the document and keep it in the file column of the new item. Is there a way to do so or a workaround ?

posts.author: Ratchet (Gautier Rigal)
posts.cookedHtml: When i want to create an item via automation in another board using another item, i can’t link the document and keep it in the file column of the new item. Is there a way to do so or a workaround ?

posts.author: davidmarmon (David Marmon)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday Team - I second this request. This would be extremely helpful.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, we need this too! when i create a item from another existing item i cannot map the to keep all files on the previous item.

posts.author: Ayelen_GIMI (Ayelen)
posts.cookedHtml: We need this as well. It will be very helpful for our process. Today we are moving the items with files manually
